title: Crispy Buffalo Chicken Wings

seo.title: Crispy Buffalo Chicken Wings Recipe | Easy & Best
seo.metaDescription: Get the ultimate crispy buffalo chicken wings recipe! Perfect for game day, these homemade wings are easy to make and packed with flavor. Learn how to get them extra crispy!

seo.imageAlt: Plate of golden brown crispy buffalo chicken wings with celery sticks and blue cheese dipping sauce.
seo.imageCaption: Serve up a platter of these irresistible crispy buffalo chicken wings for your next gathering!

description: These ultimate crispy buffalo chicken wings are a game-day essential, featuring perfectly crunchy skin and a tangy, spicy sauce. They are surprisingly easy to make at home, delivering an irresistible appetizer that will have everyone reaching for more. Get ready to impress with this classic American favorite!

ingredients.notes: flats and drumettes, patted very dry

instructions.title: Prepare the Chicken Wings
instructions.text: Preheat your oven to 400F (200C). Line a baking sheet with foil and place an oven-safe wire rack on top. Ensure chicken wings are thoroughly patted dry with paper towels; this is crucial for crispiness. In a large bowl, combine baking powder, salt, black pepper, and garlic powder. Add the dried chicken wings and toss until evenly coated.

instructions.title: Bake for Initial Crispiness
instructions.text: Arrange the coated chicken wings in a single layer on the wire rack, making sure there is space between each wing for air circulation. Bake for 25 minutes. The baking powder will react with the chicken skin to create a super crispy exterior.

instructions.title: Flip and Continue Baking
instructions.text: After 25 minutes, carefully flip each wing. Return the baking sheet to the oven and continue baking for another 20-25 minutes, or until the wings are golden brown and incredibly crispy. The internal temperature should reach 165F (74C).

instructions.title: Make the Buffalo Sauce
instructions.text: While the wings are baking, prepare the classic buffalo sauce. In a small saucepan over low heat, combine Frank's RedHot Original Hot Sauce, melted unsalted butter, and optional white vinegar. Stir until well combined and heated through. Keep warm.

instructions.title: Toss the Crispy Wings in Sauce
instructions.text: Once the wings are perfectly crispy, remove them from the oven. Transfer the hot wings to a large mixing bowl. Pour the warm buffalo sauce over the wings and toss gently with tongs until every wing is thoroughly coated in the delicious, spicy sauce.

instructions.title: Serve Immediately
instructions.text: Transfer the sauced crispy buffalo chicken wings to a serving platter. Serve hot with a side of creamy blue cheese dressing and crisp celery sticks for the ultimate game-day or party appetizer. Enjoy your homemade, perfectly crispy wings!

tips: For maximum crispiness, always pat your chicken wings as dry as possible before seasoning. Excess moisture prevents the skin from getting truly crunchy.
Using aluminum-free baking powder is key. It raises the skin's pH, breaking down proteins and allowing it to crisp up beautifully in the oven.
Serve immediately after tossing in sauce. While still delicious later, the sauce can soften the crisp skin over time.
article: Crispy Buffalo Chicken Wings is a beloved American Appetizers dish enjoyed across American. This authentic recipe brings traditional flavors to your kitchen.
